name: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Odourless 10l
shortDescription: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Odourless 10L is a premium, natural, unscented cat litter designed to provide exceptional hygiene, effortless cleaning, and powerful odor control all without artificial fragrances. Perfect for sensitive cats and fragrance-free homes, this litter combines instant clumping technology with 100% natural bentonite clay to ensure a clean, healthy environment for your feline companion.
description: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter Odourless 10L is a premium, natural, unscented cat litter designed to provide exceptional hygiene, effortless cleaning, and powerful odor control all without artificial fragrances. Perfect for sensitive cats and fragrance-free homes, this litter combines instant clumping technology with 100% natural bentonite clay to ensure a clean, healthy environment for your feline companion. Key Features 100% Natural Bentonite Clay: Made from high-quality, natural bentonite, this litter absorbs moisture rapidly on contact, forming firm, solid clumps that are easy to remove. Its natural mineral composition is safe, non-toxic, and gentle on your cat’s paws. Superior Odor Control: Effectively traps and neutralizes odors and bacteria before they spread, maintaining a fresh and clean litter box even in multi-cat households. Instant Clumping Performance: Forms tight clumps immediately upon contact with liquid, preventing the buildup of bacteria and waste. This makes scooping faster and reduces the need for frequent litter changes. Unscented / Odourless Formula: Specially formulated for cats and owners sensitive to strong fragrances . It provides a completely natural, scent-free experience while keeping your home smelling clean. Easy Cleanup & Long-Lasting Use: The strong clumping action simplifies daily cleaning, reduces litter consumption, and helps maintain overall hygiene in your cat’s space. Available Sizes: Comes in a 10L pack , with some suppliers offering 5L options for convenience and smaller households. Benefits for Cat Owners Keeps your cat’s litter box fresh, odor-free, and hygienic . Prevents bacterial growth and odor buildup naturally. Reduces cleaning time with quick clumping and easy scooping . Ideal for cats with sensitive noses or skin , thanks to its natural, fragrance-free formula. Maintains a cleaner home environment and enhances overall hygiene. Ideal For This litter is an excellent choice for cat owners in Mbaruk/Eburu Ward, Nakuru , and beyond, looking for a reliable, odourless, and easy-to-clean litter solution . Whether for single or multiple cats, Proline Odourless Bentonite Cat Litter delivers freshness, simplicity, and lasting performance every day.
